treatment_information.treatment_response: LP revealed 1 WBC and was unremarkable.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent facet injection at C2-C3.
Patient was NPO after midnight for a GI motility study.
Patient developed nausea and began dry heaving.
Neurology was consulted, and the patient received Dilaudid and Phenergan.
Patient stated that her pain was significantly improved upon arrival to the floor.

patient_outcome.final_status: Ambulatory - Independent, experiencing significant improvement in migraine pain.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with outpatient providers for further considerations about headaches.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient reported pain was significantly improved after treatment.
